name: O-0 baseline: F-2 measure-rubric emits per-rule token cost field cost_tokens per the F-2.6 token-telemetry clause
command: git init -q repo && cd repo && git -c user.email=x@y -c user.name=x commit --allow-empty -q -m c1 && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/measure-rubric.sh" --n 1 --format json >out.json 2>/dev/null && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));const r=Object.values(j.runs_per_rule)[0];process.exit(typeof r.cost_tokens==="number"?0:1)' && echo telemetered 1>&2
